expectations.evidence: Output: 'Понял задачу. Ниже разбор плана...' — no header
No audit block. Baseline gives migration strategy analysis with sections

expectations.text: Skill identifies v0.3.1 / v0.2 / tenant as needing context
expectations.evidence: Baseline uses all terms as known: 'pre-v0.2 tenants', 'migration_status=failed'

expectations.text: Skill flags mixed RU+EN code-switching as readability problem
expectations.evidence: Baseline doesn't address language mixing, itself responds in mixed RU+EN

expectations.text: BYTE-FAITHFUL: skill does NOT invent what legacy config / edge case mean
expectations.evidence: Baseline invents extensive specifics: 'continue-on-failure with quarantine', 'feature flag по migration_status', 'shared-nothing tenants', 'cross-tenant references' — all fabricated

expectations.text: Skill correctly identifies 2-option dilemma (rollback/skip) as within threshold (not flagged as multi-select violation)
expectations.evidence: Baseline treats it as engineering decision, not text-quality issue
